codeReview.summary: I reviewed the mission and architecture guidance, the fix feature transcript skeleton, the prior failed review, and both the original and fix commit diffs. This fix addresses the prior shutdown-ordering bug by letting stdout/stderr forwarding drain before relay shutdown in `wrapper/src/proxy.rs`, switching relay traffic to ordered `RelayTaskCommand`s with an explicit shutdown path in `wrapper/src/ws_client.rs`, and adding a regression test that proves a final `turn/completed` still reaches the relay when the child exits immediately. I did not find a new blocking issue in the reviewed scope.

summary: Pass. Commit `1606a87e421fd5b1790c9272050be6176ecb5513` adequately resolves the prior blocking shutdown-ordering bug from `fix-wrapper-always-forward-lifecycle` and adds deterministic regression coverage for the immediate-exit `turn/completed` case. No new blocking problems were found in this review.
